fieldValues.value: An implementation that declares `ext:discovery` MUST include in its DiscoveryQuery result set every instance that satisfies all specified structured filter predicates (`typeId`, `typeNamespace`, `typeName`, `containerId`, `tag`, `lifecycleState`, `excludeLifecycleStates`, `tier`), and MUST NOT include any instance that fails any specified structured filter predicate. (RFC-012 R1.)
